key.name: group-compose-services
key.description: When enabled, containers are separated into Docker Compose projects, single instances, and devcontainers, each group divided by a separator. Compose services from the same compose file are grouped under one compose menu with a Services submenu.

key.name: devcontainer-ide-command
key.summary: Command to open a devcontainer in the configured IDE
key.description: Shell command executed when "Open in IDE" is clicked on a running devcontainer, and automatically after a successful recreate. Use %workspaceFolder% as a placeholder for the workspace path.
